notes: Did not encounter anything that did not work as expected.
title: 3DRPG

cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes:
On first start: "getthreadcontext failed" (a common error message you may get with Unity Engine games and Nvidia drivers). Use PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command% in Steam Launch Option and the game's message box shows up, letting you choose the usual Unity games options (resolutions/graphic quality). 

Game runs super bad and slow on my PC which can run Witcher 3 or Tomb Raider on max 60FPS and AC Odyssee at 30FPS clocked (1080p). This little game does not want to run at 30FPS with Wine/Proton on lowest settings.
title: 3DRPG
